profile.personality: A restless, fluctuating constitution prone to fixation on unpleasant things and marked by erratic, changeable states. The person is sensitive to environmental shifts, particularly cold and weather changes, and their overall wellbeing swings in cycles tied to internal metabolic rhythms.
profile.mental_state: Inclined to dwell on unpleasant subjects, especially during prolonged periods of wakefulness at night; the sight of deformity or suffering produces an exaggerated shuddering response. Mental clarity and distress alternate in sync with physical symptoms, with foggy, dull aching states giving way to periods of stuporous, unrefreshing sleep.
profile.emotional_pattern: A prevailing sadness underlies the temperament, punctuated by anxiety that intensifies during perspiration. In children the disposition is cross and irritable, while in adults there is a deep restlessness and inability to find comfort, with no emotional relief even from sleep or sweating.

rubric_passages.Extremities: The extremities are full of rheumatic affections. "Lassitude in lower limbs." "Swelling of knee." All gouty affections belong to this remedy. "Gouty concretions." "Nodes on joints."
rubric_passages.Generalities: "Extreme weakness; sweat and comatose condition." Note that comatose condition with sweat; the Benzoic acid patient sweats without relief. Copious, exhaustive sweat and profound sleep, but there is no relief.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: "Too frequent desire to evacuate bladder." "Retention of urine in infants."
rubric_passages.Clinical: Gouty troubles of the liver; rheumatism; nephritic colic; it has cured such states after gonorrhoea, but it is not much of a gonorrhoeal remedy.
rubric_passages.Stool: "Stools, copious, watery." This is true in summer diarrhoea that has come on suddenly, "excessively offensive," The white stool, like soap-suds, is so strong a symptom that the remedy does not fail to cure even when the gouty constitution is not present. "Excessively offensive, scenting the whole house." "Putrid, bloody." "Watery, light-colored, very offensive stools (in children)."
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Benzoic acid is often an excellent palliating remedy in old gouty constitutions; they want to be relieved of the pains in their fingers and in the nodes and joints. The fingers crack and are clumsy and painful.
rubric_passages.Urine: It will be noticed, as one of the foremost things in this remedy's manifestations, that it has strong smelling urine; the urine is pungent, and it sometimes becomes so strong that it smells like, Hippuricum acid, and so it is said urine smells strong like that of a horse.
rubric_passages.Urine, color, red: sometimes the urine is scanty and then they suffer from bodily complaints; again the urine is copious and then they are relieved of their complaints... when the urine is copious and plenty of uric acid is being passed, and the urine is full of deposits, then the patient is at his best
rubric_passages.Urine, odor, strong: It will be noticed, as one of the foremost things in this remedy's manifestations, that it has strong smelling urine; the urine is pungent, and it sometimes becomes so strong that it smells like, Hippuricum acid, and so it is said urine smells strong like that of a horse.
rubric_passages.Urine, color: "Urine dark brown." "Brown urine smells sour." "Urine dark, urinous odor highly intensified."
rubric_passages.Urine, odor: "Foetid urine." "Urine of a very repulsive odor." The odor is sometimes like hartshorn; it is pungent; these are only efforts to describe the strong smell.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, involuntary: It has cured many times wetting the bed involuntary urination in sleep, when the bed that has been wetted several times becomes uncleanable.
rubric_passages.Stool, thin, liquid: It is well, often, when a stool is passed that is of a light liquid, to bear in mind a few remedies that produce this state and ascertain whether it is like soapsuds or filled with bubbles of air.
rubric_passages.Stool, watery, Stool, watery: "Stools, copious, watery." "Watery, light-colored, very offensive stools (in children)."
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: Sudden stoppage or slacking up of the quantity of urine; it becomes scanty, high colored, and pungent, smelling like that of a horse (Nitric acid) along with acute inflammation and swelling of the tonsils and throat inflammation of the tonsils with scanty, strong, pungent urine smelling like that of a horse.
rubric_passages.Stool, odor: "Excessively offensive, scenting the whole house." "Putrid, bloody."
rubric_passages.Stool, watery: "Stools, copious, watery." "Watery, light-colored, very offensive stools (in children)."
rubric_passages.Stool, thin: It is well, often, when a stool is passed that is of a light liquid, to bear in mind a few remedies that produce this state and ascertain whether it is like soapsuds or filled with bubbles of air.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, knee: the rheumatism goes back to the extremities, into the fingers and knees, especially the knees in Benzoic acid. "Swelling of knee."
rubric_passages.Extremities, knee: the rheumatism goes back to the extremities, into the fingers and knees, especially the knees in Benzoic acid. "Swelling of knee."
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, involuntary, night (: It has cured many times wetting the bed involuntary urination in sleep, when the bed that has been wetted several times becomes uncleanable. You can smell it almost as quick as you go into the room; the children all, smell like urine, strong urine; the house smells like urine.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, rheumatic: "Rheumatic pains in extremities relieving heart." Rheumatism alternating between the extremities and heart.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weariness: "Lassitude in lower limbs." "Extreme weakness; sweat and comatose condition."
rubric_passages.Kidneys: When the rheumatic states and these symptoms are present there are more or less pains in the kidney. "Sore pain in the back; burning in the kidney."
rubric_passages.Kidneys, inflammation: "Nephritic colic." "Sore pain in the back; burning in the kidney."
rubric_passages.Stool, white: The white stool, like soap-suds, is so strong a symptom that the remedy does not fail to cure even when the gouty constitution is not present. So we get the idea that the stools are white and that the first passages are like soap-suds, but later the soap appearance subsides and leaves a white stool.

profile.personality: Prematurely aged, worn-out individuals who appear older than their years — pallid, sickly, and feeble. They are physically and mentally exhausted, unable to sustain effort, and their constitution has broken down into a state of chronic debility.
profile.mental_state: The mind is weak with defective recollection and poor memory, unable to sustain mental effort. There is a tendency toward terrifying apparitions and imaginary forms seen in twilight, along with a general prostration of mental faculties and apathy.
profile.emotional_pattern: A pervasive melancholy and apathy dominates, with the person feeling like a drudge in all affairs of life. Domestic responsibilities fret and tire them excessively, and they alternate between states of restless irritability from constant wandering pains and profound emotional flatness or indifference.

rubric_passages.Back: There is such a soreness in the lumbar region, in the region of the kidneys, that he can bear no pressure. He cannot step down from a carriage to the pavement without letting himself down very carefully. A jar is a great shock to him, and sometimes the soreness is so great that he almost faints. Soreness in the back; in the muscles of the back, and in the region of the kidneys; and this associated with all sorts of disturbances in the urine, with excessive deposits.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Burning and soreness in the region of the kidneys. Burning stitches, single or several in succession, in regions of loins and kidneys. Much pain, soreness and tenderness in back, in the region of the kidneys. Sensitiveness in the region of the kidneys so great that any jarring motion, riding in a wagon, jumping from it, was intolerable.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Violent, cutting, tensive pain, deeply seated in left side of bladder, at last becoming a sticking, obliquely in female urethra, as if in its orifice, lasting a few minutes. Burning pain in the bladder; burning pain in the kidney. The bladder becomes very irritable. Catarrhal conditions of the bladder. Smarting, burning, stitching pains. Great urging, with pain in the neck of the bladder, with burning, scanty urine.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The wandering, stitching, tearing, twinging pains that run through Berberis are found in old gouty constitutions. Soreness, lameness in the joints, with these radiating pains. There will be burning, stitching, tearing, and the pains will radiate and appear in one part of the body then in another. A pain in the heel as if it were ulcerating, and then the pain shoots off in every direction.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The wandering, stitching, tearing, twinging pains that run through Berberis are found in old gouty constitutions, and that is where we get the greatest benefit from Berberis. In Berberis these twinging, tearing, stitching, burning pains are everywhere, they never remain in one place, but are always moving, and they are not often affected by motion. But the burning, stinging, tearing, stitching, wandering pains are the main feature, the grand feature of Berberis.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning pain in the bladder; burning pain in the kidney. Burning and soreness in the region of the kidneys. Burning stitches, single or several in succession, in regions of loins and kidneys.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Berberis especially fits a woman who is tired, with a gouty constitution; though not old in years she is physically tired, so that all of her domestic affairs fret and tire her. Coition becomes painful, and she has an aversion to it. The orgasm is delayed, or is entirely absent, and she is prostrated by it. In all the affairs of her innermost life she is a drudge.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Burning in the female urethra. Burning pain in the vagina. Violent, cutting, tensive pain, deeply seated in left side of bladder, at last becoming a sticking, obliquely in female urethra, as if in its orifice, lasting a few minutes.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Burning, stinging pain before, during, and after stool. Tearing extending around the anus. Herpes around anus. Fistula in ano.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Burning, stinging pain before, during, and after stool. Tearing extending around the anus.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Burning, stinging pain before, during, and after stool.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Violent stabbing pain in the region of the liver, taking his breath away.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Violent stabbing pain in the region of the liver, taking his breath away. Had to bend double.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Sharp, pinching pains in the liver, which come suddenly and with great severity. Violent stabbing pain in the region of the liver, taking his breath away. Had to bend double. Pains through the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: The wandering, stitching, tearing, twinging pains that run through Berberis are found in old gouty constitutions. In Berberis these twinging, tearing, stitching, burning pains are everywhere, they never remain in one place, but are always moving, and they are not often affected by motion. Whether he moves, or keeps still, they keep coming.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: In Berberis these twinging, tearing, stitching, burning pains are everywhere, they never remain in one place, but are always moving. But the burning, stinging, tearing, stitching, wandering pains are the main feature, the grand feature of Berberis.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore: Berberis especially fits a woman who is tired, with a gouty constitution; though not old in years she is physically tired, so that all of her domestic affairs fret and tire her. Coition becomes painful, and she has an aversion to it. A lack of sensation normal to these parts in the woman.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Berberis has been very useful in phtisical conditions; and in the pains, and twinging, and sufferings in persons who have been operated on for fistula in ano. It cures gall-stone colic when these little twinges go in every direction from that locality. You will be astonished to know how quickly Berberis will relieve this particular kind of renal colic.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: In the liver we have these pains, and added to them sudden stabbing like a knife puncturing the liver. Shooting, tearing, burning, stitching, twinging pains, wandering from one place to another. Gall-stone colic. Sharp, pinching pains in the liver, which come suddenly and with great severity.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: If it is the liver, they will go down into the abdomen in every direction. Pains through the abdomen. Copious, thick, mushy stools, and these are yellow, like yellow corn meal mush.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Very often cardiac troubles go along with them. The kidneys, liver, and heart are more or less disturbed in their functions and we see that Berberis takes hold of these organs. As to the heart, the pulse becomes slow. Very often it is slowed down astonishingly.
rubric_passages.Face: The patient has a sickly look; face pale, earthy complexion, with sunken cheeks and hollow, blue-encircled eyes.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, sacral region: There is such a soreness in the lumbar region, in the region of the kidneys, that he can bear no pressure. Soreness in the back; in the muscles of the back, and in the region of the kidneys.
rubric_passages.Extremities, swelling: The joints sometimes swell. Enlargement of the joints. But the swelling is not so common as the pains without swelling.
rubric_passages.Face, discoloration, pale: The patient has a sickly look; face pale, earthy complexion, with sunken cheeks and hollow, blue-encircled eyes. A low state of the economy is present; anaemic condition; feeble constitution; pallid and sickly.
rubric_passages.Generalities, numbness, externally: A pain in the heel as if it were ulcerating, and then the pain shoots off in every direction. Numbness. Lameness.

profile.personality: An intensely sensitive, nervous, and excitable individual who is oversensitive to all surroundings including noise, music, and unexpected stimuli. They startle easily and are fidgety, restless, and anxious about trifles, with a tendency to shift from one task to another without settling.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by an indescribable inner anxiety aggravated by any downward or rocking motion, producing confusion, vertigo, and a loss of orientation. Mental exertion brings on nausea and exhaustion, forcing the person to repeatedly stop work and rest, and sustained thinking becomes intolerable.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep-seated apprehension and fright characterize the emotional life, with anxiety building progressively until it peaks (often around 11 AM to 1 PM) and then suddenly clearing into lucid calm. There is emotional indifference toward intimate life and sexuality, combined with hysterical manifestations and an irritable, fretful disposition that is relieved only by the discharge of bodily functions.

rubric_passages.Bladder: crying before urination, because the bladder is involved.
rubric_passages.Chest: Borax has cured pleurisy that very much resembled Bryonia, especially on the right side like Bryonia; stitching or darting pains from without inward as if through the upper right lung posteriorly
rubric_passages.Generalities: We notice that Borax has an intensified activity throughout the body; all of his senses are made more acute. His hearing is intensified, he is oversensitive to his surroundings, over-anxious. He has an excitable spirit throughout.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: Borax has cured pleurisy that very much resembled Bryonia, especially on the right side like Bryonia; stitching or darting pains from without inward as if through the upper right lung posteriorly
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Borax cures the most violent forms of membranous dysmenorrhoea, when there are violent labor-like pains before and during the flow and it seems as if the uterus would expel itself from the vagina.
rubric_passages.Head: It has many congestive headaches, pressive headaches and much beat in the head.
rubric_passages.Mind: Anxiety, fidgetiness, and sensitiveness are prominent in Borax. He is anxious about trifles. He starts at every noise, on hearing unexpected news, from music, from excitement.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Aphthae on tongue and inside of cheek.
rubric_passages.Rectum: There are also conditions of the rectum producing thickening of the mucous membrane, with stricture, growing, smaller and smaller until finally a long thin stool is passed, no larger than a pencil. This inflammatory stricture has been cured by Borax.
rubric_passages.Skin: Wilted, wrinkled skin. Skin pale or livid.
rubric_passages.Sleep: When the mother is in the act of laying the child down on the bed it often rouses up in its sleep and cries out in fright.
rubric_passages.Stomach: After every meal flatulent distension. Constant vomiting. Vomiting of sour slime.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Stomach cough with pain extending into region of spleen.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: Vertigo and fullness in head on descending a mountain or stairs.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Worse before urination. Frequent urination preceded by cries. Orifice of urethra pains as if sore, after urinating. Desire to urinate without being able to pass a drop.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Borax has cured pleurisy that very much resembled Bryonia, especially on the right side like Bryonia
rubric_passages.Clinical: This remedy has cured gonorrhoea. Wherever there is mucous membrane you may expect to find the aphthous patches.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: stitching or darting pains from without inward as if through the upper right lung posteriorly the stitching pains might make you think of Bryonia.
rubric_passages.Ear: During menses; throbbing in head and rushing in ears.
rubric_passages.Face: The face of the infant is pale, and clay-colored. Children have small vesicles around the mouth, and on the forehead.
rubric_passages.Head, heat: It has many congestive headaches, pressive headaches and much beat in the head.

profile.personality: A weary, indifferent individual who has lost interest in work, reading, and household duties. They are easily overheated and physically plethoric, yet paradoxically sensitive to cold drafts once illness sets in.
profile.mental_state: Marked aversion to every kind of work with an inability to engage in mental effort or take interest in daily responsibilities. Great nervous excitement accompanies physical complaints, with restlessness and a sense of suffocation that dominates the mental sphere.
profile.emotional_pattern: Prevailing low spirits with deep sadness, discouragement, and great depression. Anxiety accompanies most complaints, creating a pervasive sense of dread, while the patient becomes progressively more indifferent and withdrawn as vitality declines.

profile.personality: A sluggish, venous, plethoric constitution who is deeply averse to any form of motion or disturbance. The Bryonia type is irritable and wants to be left completely alone, preferring to lie still in a dark, cool room without being spoken to or compelled to think.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dull, confused, and stupefied, with a besotted quality as if intoxicated, progressing from morning sluggishness to deeper states of unconsciousness. There is great difficulty thinking or concentrating, with aggravation from any mental exertion, and when aroused from stupor the patient is confused, sees images, and believes they are away from home wanting to be taken back.
profile.emotional_pattern: Extreme irritability is the dominant emotional trait, with every disturbance—being spoken to, questioned, or contradicted—provoking anger and worsening the condition. There is deep anxiety pervading the whole body that compels restlessness despite motion making everything worse, accompanied by fear of death, great despondency, and a changeable desiring of things that are then refused when offered.

rubric_passages.Back: Whenever he strains himself in lifting, or any unusual motion, there is pain in the kidneys, a rousing up of congesting and long-lasting pain. It is a gouty constitution with kidney troubles, so that after overheating or overexertion he gets pain in the back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Whenever he strains himself in lifting, or any unusual motion, there is pain in the kidneys, a rousing up of congesting and long-lasting pain. It is a gouty constitution with kidney troubles, so that after overheating or overexertion he gets pain in the back.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Pressure to urinate and involuntary discharge of urine.
rubric_passages.Chest: The Bryonia patient sits up and holds the head, or holds the chest; presses both hands upon the chest when coughing, feels as if the chest would fly to pieces when coughing; pains in the chest on both sides, but mostly the right side.
rubric_passages.Chill: When intermittent fever comes on with marked congestion, stupefaction of the intellect, violent rigors, even to a congestive chill, the patient lying in stupefaction or a semi-conscious state, without grinding the teeth, yet wagging the jaw back and forth by the hour, Bryonia is often suitable.
rubric_passages.Extremities: It has inflammatory conditions anywhere about the body, but particularly of the fibrous tissues, serous membranes, ligaments of joints and aponeuroses. It also affects the coating of nerves with its congestions, and these gradually increase in severity.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Every medicine has a sphere of action, a peculiar nature whereby it differs from all other medicines, and hence it becomes suitable to complaints of one class and not suitable to those of another. It is like the nature of human beings, as they differ from each other, and also like the nature of diseases, which differ from each other in character.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Girls that faint every time they go to church are relieved by Ignatia.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: All sorts of pains are felt in the stomach and bowels, but most particularly stitching and burning pains; feels as if the stomach would burst, as if the abdomen would burst.
The head feels so full she wants to press it with the hand, or tic it up; tight pressure, over the whole skull, is grateful. ... He keeps on telling us they are better from pressure in each region we go over, until, finally we come to the conclusion that they are general.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: Bryonia prefers the right side when the condition is pneumonia. We see a patient who had first a cold, and the cold has traveled down the air passages, with hoarseness and rawness in the chest and cough; the cough shakes the whole body, then comes a hard chill. He is now down in bed, and when the physician sees him be sees the state of inflammation and knows the meaning of it, and listening confirms the diagnosis of pneumonia. The patient cannot move hand or foot; the pain is mostly in the right lung, and he is compelled to lie on the right side or back and dreads motion.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: There are many symptoms of the female sexual organs of great interest. Painful menstruation, dysmenorrhoea; pain in the ovaries at the menstrual period. Every menstrual period is associated with marked congestion of the ovaries, with sensitiveness to touch.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: The sensitiveness at the approach of every menstrual period, in both groins, will be spoken of by the patient, increasing as the menstrual period comes on, until the soreness proceeds across the abdomen and meets, and then the whole abdomen is painful during the menstrual period.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: The uterus is sore, the hypogastrium is tender. Inflammation of the uterus. Burning pain mostly in the body or fundus of the uterus.
rubric_passages.Head: The head complaints may be looked upon as striking features of the remedy, because there is pain in the head with almost every acute complaint. Headaches are associated with inflammatory and congestive complaints. The mental dullness and confusion of the mind is spoken of with the congestive headache, and bursting headache.
rubric_passages.Mind: This sluggish state of the mind then is the state of Bryonia, not an excitable state, as in Coffea, Nux vomica, Ignatia, but sluggish aggravated from motion, aggravated from being talked to; wants to lie still in bed; very great irritability, which is as extreme as that found in Nux or Chamomilla.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: There is an extreme state of irritability in Bryonia; every word which compels him to answer a question or to think will aggravate him. The effort to talk will be attended with horror.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Dry mouth and thirstless like Nux moshata. ... Great dryness of the lips; the lips parched and dry.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: When he takes a cold the mouth becomes dry. It is very common for the Bryonia patient to have great thirst; he is apt to drink large quantities of water, at wide intervals.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Bryonia furnishes many symptoms in connection with the stool and rectum. It has constipation, and it has dysentery. The pathogenesis is full of these conditions as well as many symptoms relating to the parts themselves.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: In the constipation the stool is dry and hard, as if burnt. No desire for stool, but after going many days there are passages of little hard pieces as if they had been burned. No moisture about the parts, no mucus to often the hard stools.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: In the constipation the straining is often ineffectual. He has urging to stool and goes several times before there is any result. The stool seems to remain in the rectum, although he seems to be compelled to strain; there is inactivity and inability to strain.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Burning of the anus with every passage.
rubric_passages.Respiration: The Bryonia breathing is panting and very rapid, little short rapid breaths, due to the fact that deep breathing increases the pain, the Bryonia patient desires to breathe deep, wants deep breathing, needs deep breathing, but it hurts him so.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Shortness of breath, suffocation, asthma. Asthmatic attacks from becoming overheated. Asthma worse in a warm room, wants cool air to breathe.
rubric_passages.Stomach: All sorts of pains are felt in the stomach and bowels, but most particularly stitching and burning pains; feels as if the stomach would burst, as if the abdomen would burst. Peritoneal exudations. Awful soreness. Sensitiveness of the pit of the stomach, and sensitiveness over the whole abdomen.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: The Bryonia patient is subject to hiccough, to belching, to nausea and vomiting, so that disordered stomach is the general term. Bitter eructations, bitter nauseous taste.

profile.personality: A child-like, simple, and feeble-minded individual who has failed to develop intellectually despite physical maturity. They appear prematurely aged or senile, passive and placid in demeanor, lacking self-governance and prone to abandoning themselves to base impulses and vices.
profile.mental_state: Marked by progressive intellectual deterioration trending toward imbecility, with profound confusion of mind, weak memory, and loss of comprehension of surroundings. The patient may act automatically without awareness, experience states of apathy and partial coma, or alternate between passive stupidity and sudden manic excitement with incoherent speech.
profile.emotional_pattern: Easily laughs or cries with extreme sensitivity and nervousness, tittering foolishly at things that are not laughable. Oscillates between profound anxiety with hand-wringing despair over imagined future catastrophes and a state of passive, placid indifference. Longs for solitude yet dreads being alone, and becomes intensely angry when misunderstood.

rubric_passages.Chest: Burning like fire in lungs. Burning extending up into the larynx; gangrene of the lungs. Sensation of coldness in chest.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Arms became stiffened before an attack. Numbness of left arm. Blister in hand, which recurred annually. Panaritium. A great many troubles occur in the extremities, paralytic affections, etc.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: A great many troubles occur in the extremities, paralytic affections, etc.
rubric_passages.Generalities: A warm room is unbearable; headaches and flushes of the face are made worse in a warm room or when near the stove, better from bathing or in cold air. Complaints better from putting the feet in hot water. Trembling.
rubric_passages.Mind: Bufo is a wonderful medicine, it profoundly affected the mind and especially the intellectual faculties, including confusion of mind and loss of memory until the patient gradually goes towards a state of imbecility.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Stuttering and stammering; gets angry when incoherent speech is not understood. Biting the tongue. Tongue cracked, bluish black. Mouth wide open before an attack.
rubric_passages.Skin: There are patches upon the skin that have loss of sensation and others with increased sensations. Little blisters form upon the eye. These little blisters also form upon the skin, and the integument is thrown off and there is no healing.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Urine passes involuntarily. The urine passes involuntarily in such as are becoming imbeciles from the epileptic attacks, in approaching softening of the brain.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: Paralytic conditions of the lids and muscles of the eye. A great many troubles occur in the extremities, paralytic affections, etc.
rubric_passages.Clinical: This is one of the remedies that you will need to use for the development of feeble-minded children whether there are spasms or not.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: During menses contractive pain in liver.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: The attack originates in abdomen; that is, he has a feeling of anxiety in the abdomen previous to the attack. Spasms end by convulsive movements in abdomen.
rubric_passages.Face: Phlegmonous erysipelas about the face. Headaches and flushes of the face are made worse in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: You see how burning runs all through the remedy; it occurs wherever there are inflammatory conditions or where nerves are sensitive and painful, and the nerve sheath becomes painful and sensitive to touch along its course hence its use in sciatica and other inflammatory conditions of large nerves.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, lower limbs: The nerve sheath becomes painful and sensitive to touch along its course hence its use in sciatica and other inflammatory conditions of large nerves. Rending, tearing pains that extend down the thighs.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, lower limbs, sciatica: The nerve sheath becomes painful and sensitive to touch along its course hence its use in sciatica and other inflammatory conditions of large nerves.
rubric_passages.Face, expression, foolish: He drops the jaw and looks stupid as if he had forgotten everything.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions: Sometimes local spasm and sometimes complete epileptic spasms with bleeding at the mouth, unconsciousness, falling down.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions, consciousness, wi: Bufo often corresponds to lesser attacks resembling vertigo. In this state people do not fall, and for a few seconds everything is blank, or sometimes they do things automatically in these moments.

When the girl lies in an unconscious condition during the menstrual period and has several epileptic spasms which she has no realization of until told and then she is too much dazed to understand it she needs Bufo.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions, epileptic: The milder conditions of dizziness have gone on to sudden falling and collapse, a sudden state of unconsciousness with spasms and biting of the tongue. Some of the epileptic attacks occur with regular periodicity, others occur irregularly.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: There is great disturbance of the sexual organs. Sometimes the sexual organs are in a state of excitement and sometimes in a state of impotency, but the patient is low-minded, inclination to carry the hand constantly to the genital organs. Semen is discharged too quickly without pleasurable sensation.
rubric_passages.Mind, unconsciousness: The milder conditions of dizziness have gone on to sudden falling and collapse, a sudden state of unconsciousness with spasms and biting of the tongue.
rubric_passages.Face, expression: He drops the jaw and looks stupid as if he had forgotten everything.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions, consciousness: Sometimes complete epileptic spasms with bleeding at the mouth, unconsciousness, falling down. Besides such grave state, it has milder states that may be called dizziness or vertigo.

profile.personality: A taciturn, withdrawn individual who is unwilling to speak or answer questions. They tend toward sadness and weeping, becoming increasingly silent and uncommunicative as their suffering deepens. Despite intense inner turmoil, they internalize rather than express, except when pain forces involuntary screaming.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by a conviction that their disease is incurable and that death is imminent, driven by the sheer intensity of their physical suffering. Cerebral congestion produces sluggishness and stupor rather than anxiety or restlessness, and mental exertion generates oppressive heat in the head. There is a feeling of going mad from the relentless pressure and constriction.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional experience is fear of death arising not from anxious imagination but from the overwhelming reality of their pain — they genuinely believe such suffering must end fatally. Deep sadness and an irresistible inclination to weep pervade the emotional landscape, accompanied by a sense of hopelessness. Sleep is disturbed by vivid, exciting dreams of falling, and they startle awake in fright.

rubric_passages.Back: Great pressure at heart, going round under left axilla to back.
rubric_passages.Chest: Constrictions of the chest. Oppression as if a great load was on his chest, crushing the life out of him, so great is the constriction, and the congestion.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation of the heart, continued day and night when walking, and, at night when lying on the left side.
rubric_passages.Chill: Its intermittent fever will bring on a chill with violent congestion to the head at ii o'clock. Regular paroxysms at 1 A.M. and 1 P.M., or sometimes at 1 A.M. and sometimes at if P.M. A daily chill at 1 A.M.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Cramping especially of the left arm. Complete numbness of the left arm along with cardiac conditions in the history of rheumatism and in hysteria.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Constrictions, contractions and congestions run through Cactus. Determination of blood to the head, and coldness of the extremities. Or determination of blood to an organ, the chest, or the heart. There is never an equal circulation of blood in the body; it is spasmodic and irregular.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Inflammation of the ovaries; inflammation of the uterus. It is a medicine that you will need to know when a young, plethoric, vigorous woman comes down violently with congestion of the uterus at the menstrual period, and she screams because of the violent clutching and cramping of the uterus.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Before the flow starts, or just at the beginning, there is violent spasm. The circular fibres clutch; and she describes it accurately as if a tape were tied around that sore and congested uterus.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are constricting, pressing. They are all violent, with intense heat of the head, for they are congestive.
rubric_passages.Mind: Sadness, taciturnity, and irresistible inclination to weep. Fear of death that is, he thinks he is going to die from the severity of the pain. He believes his disease is incurable.
rubric_passages.Rectum: It is a remedy for the cure of hemorrhoids; the relaxation of the great portal system, and the lower veins in the rectum, the hemorrhoidal veins. The veins are in such a state of relaxation that tumors will form, and bleed copiously. Bleeding hemorrhoids. Constriction of the anus. it has a very troublesome constipation; constipation in connection with hemorrhoids.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Around the attachment of the diaphragm feeling as if a cord was tied tighter and tighter; round the lower part of the chest. This is a strange symptom; it clutches him so tightly around the waist line that it takes his breath away, and he struggles for breath, and wants to do something.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Could only breathe with shoulders elevated and lying on back. Periodical attacks of suffocation, with fainting; cold sweat.
rubric_passages.Sleep: With all the cardiac remedies we have violent dreams, great excitement of the brain during sleep, waking up startled and frightened, very commonly with a feeling of failing. Dreams of falling. Dreams full of excitement.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Strong pulsations felt in strange places, in the stomach, and in the bowels; sometimes in the extremities, the feet and hands, as well as in the head. Throbbing all over.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: Congestion of the brain, with hot head, flushed face. Congestion of the brain, first with very red face, then darker from the venous stasis, and then stupor. He grows sluggish under the cerebral congestion.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has been recommended for threatened apoplexy, when the congestion is so violent, and the face is flushed and purple, or very red, and the pulsation is felt in the brain and all over.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: Feeling as if heart was compressed or squeezed by a band. Cardiac rheumatism, Heart seemed to be held by an iron band for many hours. Pain in the cardiac region. Great pressure at heart, going round under left axilla to back.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: In the uterus it produces the, most violent cramps. Clutching, and constrictions, as it the uterus were grasped and held tightly, like a spasm. Constriction, like hour-glass contraction, in the uterus.
rubric_passages.Head, vertex: Heavy pain like a weight on vertex; better by pressure, but worse from sounds, hearing, talking, or strong light.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: It has a sensation of tightness and constriction about the head, about the chest, about the attachments of the diaphragm, all over the abdomen. Cactus produces congestion of the bowels; inflammation of the uterus. Gastric inflammation and with, it the clutching.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: It has such a prolonged determination of blood to the heart that the heart finally becomes disturbed in its function, disturbed in its tissues; and it has a profound curative action upon the heart and even cures organic heart diseases. Contractions about the heart that are tonic in character, like a tight clutching; constriction.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Rush of blood to the chest, as if the chest was filled with hot gushes of blood, with constrictions, and constriction of the heart.
rubric_passages.Face: The face is flushed bright red, becoming blue. With weakness of the heart it is blue, blue lips.
rubric_passages.Head, heat: Heat in the head from mental exertion is a strong symptom of Cactus. This symptom is found in persons who are trying to break off from coffee and Cactus is often the remedy.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: A pressing in the top of the head as if the top of the head would be forced in; but this is ameliorated by pressing hard upon the pain. Right-sided headaches. Pulsating headaches. Heavy, pulsating pain in the head. Tensive pain in the head, tensive pain in the vertex.

profile.personality: A profoundly exhausted and withdrawn individual who desires complete stillness and quiet. They are averse to all work, both mental and physical, preferring to be left entirely alone rather than engaging with the world around them.
profile.mental_state: The mind is characterized by deep indolence and a dread of any exertion, with marked anxiety similar to Arsenicum but without the restlessness. There is a sluggishness and slowness of mental function, as seen in low, deep-seated febrile states where cognitive capacity diminishes progressively.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is one of resigned despair — 'Don't speak to me; don't bother me; let me die in peace.' There is intense anxiety coupled with a paradoxical desire for absolute quiet and immobility, representing a person who has surrendered to their suffering rather than fighting against it.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Nauseated all the way down to the abdomen like Ipec., Ant. t., and Asarum, extensive nausea.
rubric_passages.Chill: Every time he takes cold water, which he craves, goose-flesh comes on, a creeping or horripilation like Capsicum.
rubric_passages.Extremities: "Asleep" sensation, or like ants crawling in the extremities, deep in the muscles and the skin.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: Numbness of parts; the nose, one hand; numbness in spots.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: After an apoplectic attack when the patient recovers, but weakness of one arm and leg remains, it competes with Phos. ... Paralyzed parts are sometimes painful. Crawling in paralyzed parts.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Cadmium sulph. has been only partially proved, so that only a limited amount of information can be given concerning it.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning and cutting pains in the stomach. ... Burning in the stomach extending up into the oesophagus; fluids burn all the way up into the mouth and throat; sour, acid fluids.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: it has great weakness; ... great exhaustion.
rubric_passages.Head: Vertigo in the room; the bed spins round. The head symptoms, anxiety and vertigo are such as occur in low types of gastro-intestinal irritation. Lancinating in the head, pulsating in the temples.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion, vertex: headaches occurring in the low forms of fever, with great rush of blood to the head.
rubric_passages.Mind: There is a dread of work; aversion to doing everything, mental and physical.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Running through it we find it is spasmodic and nervous; it affects the muscles like Zinc.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Disturbances of the taste. It is suitable to low forms of continued fever; it has sordes, dark tongue, bleeding tongue and dry mouth, as in typhus, typhoid and yellow fever. Sluggish tongue; difficulty in moving it.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: dry mouth, as in typhus, typhoid and yellow fever.

profile.personality: A neurasthenic, highly excitable individual who alternates between foolish boldness and extreme fearfulness. Deeply absent-minded and forgetful, often unable to distinguish whether events actually occurred, requiring physical verification of reality. Prostrated mentally and physically, often from sexual excesses or tobacco use.
profile.mental_state: The mind is profoundly weak and scattered; the more effort applied to concentration, the further thoughts slip away, making intellectual work impossible. Memory is vague and unreliable, bordering on imbecility, with a dazed, stupefied quality resembling low typhoid delirium. Forgetfulness pervades daily life, with tasks and obligations simply escaping the mind as if it were 'worn through in places.'
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by nervous anxiety and exaggerated startle responses—terrified by slamming doors, rustling newspapers, and imagined diseases—yet paradoxically capable of reckless indifference to real danger. Tormented by intense lascivious desires coupled with complete inability to fulfill them, producing a cycle of craving, frustration, and apprehension. Sleepless nights are filled with anxious groaning, vivid dreams remembered better than waking life, and restless dread of the future.

rubric_passages.Generalities: The patient in general is aggravated by warmth and the warm room, and ameliorated by cool open air. Yet he wants warm drinks in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The most striking symptom of the female sexual organs is the pruritus; she is compelled to scratch, and the torment reduces her in body and mind.
rubric_passages.Mind: An individual puts his mind to bear upon something which seems to have taken place during the day, but he is not quite sure whether it took place or not; he thinks the matter over, and yet he cannot be really sure whether it took place or not, until he actually goes and puts his hands upon the object thought about; proves to himself by actual contact and observation that his vague impression was so, that it was true, then he goes away and again he is undecided as to whether it was so or not.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Groans and moans anxiously in sleep so that he wakens the neighbors. Restless sleep; anxious, vivid dreams which he remembers better than the things of the day. Falls asleep and continues to dream of the same subject where he left off.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Vertigo and nausea in the morning with stitch in pit of stomach.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Pulsating in the stomach after walking; empty feeling, fluttering in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Tobacco heart. The nervous symptoms of tobacco are similar to those of Caladium, and Caladium is useful in all sorts of nervous conditions, the effect of tobacco and cigarette smoking.
rubric_passages.Face: Sensation of a fly crawling on the face.
rubric_passages.Generalities, lying: Rocking, dizzy sensation after lying down and closing the eyes, as it in a rocking chair.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Violent sexual desire with relaxed penis. Impotency. Erections when half asleep in the morning, ceasing when fully awake.
rubric_passages.Fever: This remedy's fever is a continued fever it has not great amount of fever in it, but it is a continued fever we shall see that there is coma and stupor from fever.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain, cutting: Stitches as from knives in the rectum.
rubric_passages.Face, congestion: There is a good deal of congestion of the brain, more or less excitement, but more important is prostration of the mind, weakness of the mind.
rubric_passages.Generalities, lassitude: He cannot think; the more thought he puts upon a thing the more fatigue he has and the further away that thing seems to be.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male, sexual passion, increase: Such men stand on the street corner and feast upon the forms of passing girls, and their semen dribbles away.

profile.personality: A deeply anxious, restless individual who is physically and mentally weak, sensitive to cold, and averse to open air. They desire company yet are inclined to criticize others, and are obstinate, easily offended, and irritable.
profile.mental_state: Marked confusion of mind especially on waking, with inability to concentrate and weakness of memory. Prone to delusions, seeing dead people, phantoms, and visions of fire, especially at night and on closing the eyes. Irresolution and mental exhaustion characterize their thinking, with mental exertion temporarily relieving head pain but worsening it afterward.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by deep anxiety and apprehensiveness, particularly about the future, salvation, and death, worse at night. Extreme sadness, despair of recovery, loathing and weariness of life coexist with fear of solitude and insanity. Restless tossing in bed at night, easily startled, timid, and prone to weeping, with complaints arising from anger and vexation.

rubric_passages.Extremities: Oedema of the hands and feet. Weakness of lower limbs.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Great mental and physical weakness. Tremulous and paralytic weakness. Sense of lightness of the body as if floating in the air. Fainting spells.
rubric_passages.Mind: Anger and complaints from anger and vexation. Anxiety in evening, at night, in bed, and during a chill, and on waking. Apprehensiveness; about the future, about his salvation, at night.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Suffocation and palpitation at night in bed.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Complaints are worse from slight exertion; faintness, palpitation, dyspnea and weakness come on.
rubric_passages.Sleep: The sleep is disturbed by violent dreams. Palpitation and suffocation. Latter part of night wakeful, and much sweat.
rubric_passages.Sleep, restless: Extreme restlessness, especially at night, tossing about in bed; during heat; and during menses.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: There is violent rush blood to the head with vertigo and general spasm.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Scanty, burning urine, contains albumin and casts.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is deep acting enough to cure some of our most stubborn cases of epilepsy. It has made its record in this class of cases.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness, mental depression: Extreme sadness in evening, and during fever.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness: Extreme sadness in evening, and during fever.
rubric_passages.Sleep, dreams: The sleep is disturbed by violent dreams.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions: Epileptic convulsions where the aura is felt in the region of the heart.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions, epileptic: It is deep acting enough to cure some of our most stubborn cases of epilepsy. It has made its record in this class of cases.
rubric_passages.Urine: Scanty, burning urine, contains albumin and casts.
rubric_passages.Urine, albuminous: Scanty, burning urine, contains albumin and casts. It has cured many cases of albuminuria in the early stages.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult, ascending: Many symptoms from ascending stairs. Complaints are worse from slight exertion; faintness, palpitation, dyspnea and weakness come on.
The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat. Aversion to the open air.
rubric_passages.Sleep, dreams, frightful: The sleep is disturbed by violent dreams.
rubric_passages.Generalities, cold: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat. Aversion to the open air.
rubric_passages.Vertigo, walking: Weakness, or vertigo, or momentary blindness.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat, vital, lack of: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat, vital: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat.
rubric_passages.Vertigo, walking, sensation of gliding i: Sense of lightness of the body as if floating in the air.

profile.personality: A fatigued, mentally exhausted individual who becomes overwhelmed by prolonged effort of any kind. Once industrious and capable, the Calcarea type gradually withdraws from work and responsibility, appearing lazy but actually depleted. They are chilly, flabby, and sensitive to their environment, easily disturbed by cold, exertion, and emotional excitement.
profile.mental_state: The mind is weak and unable to sustain prolonged thought; the patient dwells obsessively on trivial matters and cannot put them aside, forming conclusions from emotion rather than intelligence. There is a profound fear of going insane, with the conviction that others are observing their mental deterioration. On closing the eyes, horrible visions and spectral images appear, and the patient may talk to themselves, carry on imaginary conversations, or sit idly performing small repetitive actions like breaking sticks or bending pins.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by anxiety, fear, and hopelessness — fear of death, of misfortune, of losing reason, and of being alone. The patient is easily frightened, startled by every noise, and prone to melancholy and weariness of life. Emotional excitement of any kind — grief, worry, vexation, or fright — produces prolonged prostration, palpitation, and vertigo, with complaints lasting days or weeks after the emotional disturbance.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: The lymphatic glands in the abdomen become hard, inflamed and sore, like great nodules, like hickory nuts; tubercular.
rubric_passages.Back: There are spine symptoms; plenty of them. Weak; all degrees of weakness. The Calcarea patient is so weak in the back that he slides down in the chair while sitting; cannot sit right in his chair.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: The Calcarea patient is so weak in the back that he slides down in the chair while sitting; cannot sit right in his chair. Rests on the back of his head. The back of his chair and the back of his head come in contact. A weak spine, a sensitive spine, and the glands of the neck are swollen.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Calcarea has a tendency to grow warts and polypoid growths, pedunculated growths, that bleed easily, that are soft and spongy... polypi in the nose and ears, in the vagina, in the bladder, and here and there.
rubric_passages.Chest: The chest troubles furnishes one of our best fields for Calcarea. We having spiting of blood prolonged cough; copious expectoration of thick yellow mucus, or even pus; ulceration, or abscess. Tickling cough.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Great anxiety and oppression. Restlessness and palpitation. Despairing; hopeless.
rubric_passages.Chill: If he gets into a sweat, and stops long enough to be comfortable, the perspiration will stop so suddenly that he will have a chill, or he will have a headache.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In the extremities we have all the rheumatic conditions that it is possible to describe. Gouty affections of the joints, with enlarged joints; gouty conditions, especially of the small joints, of the toe and finger.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: The feet are always cold, or cold and damp, except at night in bed after piling clothing upon the feet more than any other part of the body, then the feet begin to get warm, and then they often go to the other extreme and burn; and so they burn at night in bed.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Sensitiveness to cold and weakness run through the remedy. Weakness in the legs. Inability to endure. Worse from every kind of exertion. Out of breath. Fat, flabby anemic subjects, sometimes they look plump, often flushed in the face, but they have no endurance, and if such a patient undertakes a little exertion he is down sick with a fever, or a headache.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: No ability of the muscles to sustain prolonged effort, and it is the same way with the mind. No ability of the mind to sustain prolonged mental effort. Calcarea is a tired patient.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The woman is affected in a similar way. You need not be surprised, when you hear all of the constitutional weakness, that it is a common thing for Calcarea women to be sterile. So tired, so relaxed; wholly unfit for reproduction.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Burning soreness in the genitals from leucorrhoea. Itching and rawness from leucorrhoea.
rubric_passages.Head: One of the most striking symptoms of the head of the Calcarea patient is the sweat, the sweat of the head upon the slightest exertion. He will sweat on the face when he sweats nowhere else, and his head is covered with cold sweat when he is comfortable in other places about the body.
rubric_passages.Mind: All the mind symptoms represent Calcarea as in a state of great weakness; inability to prolong mental operation. Becomes very tired from mental work. Full of anxiety. He is tired mentally, and tired physically, from mental work and breaks down in a sweat, and becomes excited and irritable and disturbed.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: He is tired mentally, and tired physically, from mental work and breaks down in a sweat, and becomes excited and irritable and disturbed. Great disturbance of the emotions; complaints lasting for days and weeks from excitement of the emotions.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Great anxiety and oppression. Restlessness and palpitation. Despairing; hopeless.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The lips are cracked and bleeding. Painful swelling on the parotid glands; painful swelling of the sub-lingual and sub-maxillary glands.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Great relaxation in the tissues everywhere; relaxation of muscles; relaxation of veins; relaxation of the walls of blood-vessels to such a great extent, especially in the lower limbs and anus, that there are marked hemorrhoidal manifestations or marked varicose veins in the legs.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Again, it is one of the most useful medicines in old, lingering, stubborn cases of constipation. When there is only a moderate diarrhoea the stool is white; and when this constipation is present, the stool is white, or like chalk.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Distended veins, burning in these varicose veins. Burning and smarting. Bleeding and oozing.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Much rattling of mucus; rattling breathing; coarse rattling; that is, much mucus in the trachea, in the larynx, in the bronchial tubes, in the chest. Great dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: The dyspnoea comes on from going up stairs, from walking against the wind. Anything that has any exertion in it will bring on the dyspnoea. We find this in asthma, weak heart, weak chest and in threatening phthisis.

profile.personality: A chilly, weather-sensitive individual who is aggravated by cold, drafts, and damp conditions, and who craves warmth and motion. The Calcarea Fluorica type tends toward a stoic constitution marked by slow, insidious development of hard, indurated conditions in the body, reflecting a rigidity that pervades the physical and mental plane.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by a heaviness and lack of refreshment, with unrefreshing sleep and vivid, disturbing dreams that may cause the patient to jump out of bed. There is a general dullness and difficulty with sustained mental exertion, paralleling the blurred vision that comes from straining the eyes.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is one of sadness and misery, a quiet, pervasive melancholy rather than acute distress. The patient tends to feel worse during periods of rest and inactivity, suggesting that stagnation deepens their emotional suffering, while purposeful movement and warmth bring relief.

rubric_passages.Back: It cured a lumbago, worse during rest, and better from heat, after Rhus had failed. Pain in back, extending to the sacrum.
rubric_passages.Extremities: A recurrent fibroid in the hallow of the knee was removed once by the knife, but returned, and grew to the size of a fist. The leg was drawn up to forty-five degrees, and the knee became immovable.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The patient is sensitive to cold, to drafts, to changes in the weather, and to damp weather. The symptoms are ameliorated by heat and by warm applications. The symptoms are worse during rest.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Varicose veins of the vulva. Uterine fibroid.
rubric_passages.Head: This remedy has cured a fluctuating tumor on the cranium of infants known as Cephalaematoma.
rubric_passages.Clinical: I refer to its ability to cure indurated infiltrations of glands, cellular tissues and bony formations. A nodule in the course of a tendon and exostosis, a stony bard gland, bony infiltration in the periosteum, rice bodies in cartilages have been cured by this remedy wonderful to tell, when there was a paucity of symptoms.
rubric_passages.Eye: Blur before the eyes after exerting the vision. Cataract. It cures ulceration of the cornea if the edges are hard; also hard, small spots and conjunctivitis.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea: Dryness and tickling in the larynx. Desire to clear the vocal cords. Hoarseness after reading aloud.
rubric_passages.Urine: Copious watery urine. Strong smelling urine. Urine causes smarting when passing.
rubric_passages.Cough: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx. Spasmodic cough.
rubric_passages.Cough, tickling: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, tickling in the air: Dryness and tickling in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Nose: It has cured adenoids and thick, yellowish green discharge from the nose. Offensive catarrh of long standing.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, tickling: Dryness and tickling in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Cough, tickling, larynx, in, from: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
The patient is sensitive to cold, to drafts, to changes in the weather, and to damp weather.
rubric_passages.Generalities, cold: The patient is sensitive to cold, to drafts, to changes in the weather, and to damp weather.
rubric_passages.Back, spine: Pain in back, extending to the sacrum.
rubric_passages.Cough, tickling, larynx, in: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Cough, tickling, larynx: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Extremities, arthritic nodosities: This is a useful remedy in gout, with copious pale urine and diarrhea.
rubric_passages.Generalities, indurations: I refer to its ability to cure indurated infiltrations of glands, cellular tissues and bony formations.

profile.personality: A weary, restless constitution that seeks solitude yet is discontent with present surroundings, wandering from place to place. The individual is mentally and physically sluggish, easily fatigued by any exertion, and deeply sensitive to cold weather and environmental changes. There is a fundamental weakness of structure and vitality, manifesting as a person who seems never fully developed or robust.
profile.mental_state: The mind is tired and feeble, with poor memory and a marked inability to sustain mental effort; even thinking about complaints worsens them. There is a dread of intellectual work, as it brings on headaches and exhaustion — the classic schoolchild who always comes home with a headache. Fear readily triggers physical symptoms such as palpitation and trembling, and the mind may deteriorate toward imbecility in severe cases.
profile.emotional_pattern: Extremely fretful and discontented, with a strong tendency to withdraw into solitude to brood over sorrows and avoid the effort of social interaction. Deeply affected by bad news, grief, unrequited love, and vexation — these emotional shocks can precipitate or worsen physical illness. There is a restless dissatisfaction that drives the person to seek change, yet no new place or circumstance brings relief.

rubric_passages.Back: The back pains are worse in cold, stormy weather, attended with stiffness, and worse in the morning. The back is sensitive to draft. Pain in the back from lifting or straining. Curvature of spine. Tearing, shooting; tenderness and aching in the spine. Soreness in sacroiliac symphysis. Pain in lumbar region and sacrum at the menstrual period.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back from lifting or straining. Curvature of spine. Tearing, shooting; tenderness and aching in the spine. Soreness in sacroiliac symphysis. Pain in lumbar region and sacrum at the menstrual period.
rubric_passages.Chest: Stitching pains in the chest. Emaciation of the chest. Difficult expectoration. It is a very useful remedy in phthisis and blood spitting. Much sweat on the chest. Rattling in the chest with difficult expectoration, like Caust. Soreness of the chest to touch. Palpitation, with trembling of the limbs.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Rheumatic pains in the limbs in cold weather, worse from motion, better during rest and from heat. Trembling in all the limbs. Stiffness after resting, and in the morning. Aching in the bones, like growing pains. Gouty fingers and toes that become painful in cold weather. Ulcerative pains in the roots of the nails.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: The most severe tearing, shooting pains are in the lower limbs. The probable reason for this is that the lower limbs are always cold to the knees, and the cold parts are always the suffering parts in this remedy.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The complaints of this remedy are generally better during rest, come on during motion, and are greatly aggravated by exertion. Stiffness on moving in bed. General bodily weakness. Numbness of many parts. Trembling. Fear brings on complaints; palpitation.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Her sufferings at puberty when she is slow in maturing are often met by this medicine. From taking cold at first menstrual period often comes a painful menstruation that lasts during menstrual life, unless cured by this remedy. Violent cramping in uterus and groin several hours before the flow starts, relieved after the flow has been fully established.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Violent cramping in uterus and groin several hours before the flow starts, relieved after the flow has been fully established. The pains make her cry out. Burning in the vagina and uterus during menses.
rubric_passages.Head: The dull headaches of school children-always come home from school with headache. The head is sensitive to a jar, to pressure, to the hat; wants it washed in cold water; wants to be quite and alone. Throbbing and burning in the head. Rheumatic headache, seems to be in the whole head, in cold weather, being out in the cold wind; worse from walking, worse from exertion, worse at night.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mind shows above all a tired and weak brain. Feeble memory, and inability to sustain mental effort. Suffering in the head from mental exertion. Dreads mental exertion. Sluggish mind. Imbecility. Feeble minded children.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Discontented with his own surroundings and goes from place to place.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Foul taste in mouth. Bitter taste in the morning. Tongue coated in the morning. Tongue swollen, numb and stiff.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Constipation, with difficult, hard stool. Bleeding from the rectum and anus during stool. Protruding piles so painful that he is kept in bed for weeks; the pain is intense standing, walking, from touch; ameliorated by heat; with general sufferings, every sudden cold change of the weather. Piles itch and burn and discharge yellow pus. Itching of the anus in the evening.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Suffocation on slight exertion, or on ascending stairs. In thin, pale, sickly people with dry, hacking cough worse in cold, damp weather in rheumatic constitutions. Yellow expectoration.
rubric_passages.Skin: Pale, waxy skin; anaemia. Itching, burning, eruptions.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Sleepy daytime and evening. Sleepless after going to bed until midnight or later. Very sleepy in the morning. Vivid dreams. Children cry out in sleep. Frightful dreams cause him to awaken with a start.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: Sleepy daytime and evening. Very sleepy in the morning.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Easily disordered stomach. Cold drinks, ice cream, fruits disorder the stomach, causing pain or diarrhoea. Pain in stomach after food. Eructations and nausea. Soreness in the stomach. Sour eructations, nausea and vomiting. Burning in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Gnawing, empty feeling in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires, meat: Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Pain in stomach after food. Violent pain in the stomach; diarrhoea aggravated by the least food.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Burning in the abdomen, rising up into the chest. Pain in the abdomen ameliorated by passing flatus. Colic, followed by diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: Discontented with his own surroundings and goes from place to place.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Gnawing, empty feeling in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires: Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured polypi of nose, rectum and uterus. It has cured enlarged glands of the neck, groin and abdomen. Non-union of fractured bones, swollen condyles, are symptoms accepted by all text-books as strong symptoms of this remedy.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: After becoming chilled, pain in the liver, soreness, aggravated after eating and by motion; wants to keep quiet. Stitching pains in the liver from deep breathing or sudden motion. Pulsating in the liver.

profile.personality: A sluggish, indolent constitution prone to irritability and obstinacy, with aversion to company and mental or physical exertion. The person is changeable in mood—morose and sad in the morning, mirthful in the evening—and tends toward timidity and bashfulness in conversation. They are easily offended, quarrelsome, and harbor hatred toward those who disagree with them.
profile.mental_state: The mind is weak, forgetful, and slow, with marked confusion on waking and from mental exertion, ameliorated in open air. There is absent-mindedness, difficulty with speech (stumbling over words), and vanishing of thoughts while concentrating. The person sits brooding over imaginary misfortunes, with a tendency toward persistent tormenting thoughts and feeble-mindedness approaching imbecility.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep anxiety pervades—about the future, health, salvation, and fear of death, insanity, and misfortune—worst at night and in bed, relieved in open air. There is profound despondency with loathing of life, despair of recovery, and lamenting over feeling unappreciated. The emotional state swings between extremes: morning sadness giving way to evening hilarity, with underlying discontent, impatience, and restlessness throughout.

rubric_passages.Back: Sensation of coldness in the back. This has been a valuable remedy in the treatment of curvature of the spine in the lumbar region, making it difficult for him to sit up.
rubric_passages.Chest: Abscess in the axilla. Anxiety in the region of th heart. Catarrh of the trachea and bronchial tubes. Hemorrhage from the lungs. Badly treated pneumonia or results of pneumonia. Hepatization of the lungs. Oppression of the chest. Rawness in the chest. Soreness in the chest on coughing, or inspiration. Burning pain in the chest. Cutting in the chest. Palpitation at night; anxious; aggravated ascending, in persons going into phthisis. Suppuration in the chest. Weakness in the chest. Itching, burning of the external chest.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The symptoms of the extremities make a gouty constitution. Gouty joints. Awkward, clumsy fingers, from gouty finger joints. Coldness of the extremities, of the hands, legs and feet. Cramps in the calves. Eruptions, pimples and vesicles. Heat of the hands. Heaviness of the lower limbs. This remedy has been of great service in many cases of hip joint disease. Itching of, the, skin of the extremities. Often itching and burning.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The patient is aggravated from every motion. His muscles are flabby; he is disposed to hemorrhages. Great bodily weakness. Standing aggravates many complaints, but especially the joints. Swollen and indurated glands. Twitching of the muscles all over the body. Many of the symptoms are aggravated on waking.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Throughout the chest and head, and sometimes extending into the limbs, there is a violent orgasm of blood, flushes of heat and pulsations.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In women who have had several abortions, when the symptoms agree. Excoriation of the labia. Inflammation of the labia, with suppuration. Itching of the genitals from leucorrhoea. Thick, yellow, bloody, leucorrhoea. Itching of the labiae during menses. Itching after menses. Itching high up in the vagina.
rubric_passages.Head: The head feels constricted, especially the forehead and occiput. Much dandruff forms upon the scalp. Eruptions upon the scalp with thick yellow - crusts. Eczema, also pimples. Coldness in the head, especially forehead. Formication of the scalp. The hair falls out. Heat of the head morning and evening. Flushes of heat. Heat in the forehead and in the vertex. Heaviness in the forehead and occiput.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion, vertex: Hyperoemia of the brain, aggravated in the evening and at night. Aggravated after stimulants; especially on coughing; during menses; with suppressed menses, and in a warm room. Ameliorated in the open air.
rubric_passages.Mind: The patient is absent minded; irritable; easily angered. He becomes weak after anger and vexation. Aversion to answering questions. He is easily made anxious, especially in the evening in bed, during the night and when lying. Anxiety with fear during fever. Anxiety about the future, Anxious about his heart and his health in general. His anxiety is ameliorated in the open air.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Extreme irritability in the evening. Irritable after coition.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, night: Restlessness. Fear of insanity and fear of misfortune, and this comes on at night.
rubric_passages.Rectum: In the rectum there is formication and intense itching. Hemorrhage from the rectum and anus. External piles. Inactivity of the rectum. Involuntary stool. Moisture about anus, causing smarting and itching. Pain during and after stool. Burning pain during stool. Pressing, stitching and soreness in the anus. Tenesmus at stool. Prolapsus of the rectum. Ineffectual urging to stool.
rubric_passages.Skin: Burning and itching. Desquamation. Cracked skin. The skin is cracked after washing in winter, especially of the hands, like we find in salt rheum. Liver spots; pale skin and yellow skin, even to marked cases of jaundice. Dryness of the skin. The eruptions are boils, burning moist or dry eczema, herpetic pustules, scabby scaly vesicles. Itching, burning eruptions.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Sleep restless. Dreams anxious and frightful. Sleepiness during the evening. Sleepless before midnight and after 3 P-m- Sleepless from thoughts.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Increased, appetite. Ravenous appetite. Or appetite entirely wanting. Aversion to coffee, to meat and to milk. Desires, fruit, cold drinks, acids, salt things; sweets. Thirst extreme. Distension after eating. Emptiness in the stomach. Eructations after eating. Empty eructations. Eructations acrid, bitter, foul, sour.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Increased, appetite. Ravenous appetite. Or appetite entirely wanting.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion, meat: Aversion to coffee, to meat and to milk.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: Vertigo is a common feature with this patient. In the morning on getting up, or again in the evening; but this is ameliorated in the open air. Vertigo With nausea. Vertigo with a tendency to fall. Epileptic vertigo. Vertigo on moving the head quickly, on stooping and on walking fast.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness, extending: Sensation of coldness in the back.
rubric_passages.Back, weakness: Complaints from straining muscles and tendons, from overlifting, etc. Lame back from such causes.

profile.personality: An extremely reactive and volatile constitution, swinging between violent excitement and total prostration. The Camphor patient is difficult to manage—restless, demanding, never satisfied with conditions, constantly wanting changes in temperature and environment. They are deeply sensitive to cold yet paradoxically reject covering when chilled.
profile.mental_state: The mind oscillates between frenzy and imbecility, with confusion, loss of memory, and states resembling stupor. There is delirium with rage and mania, an impulse to jump from bed or windows, and a progressive deterioration toward unconsciousness. The mental faculties collapse under shock, with the appearance of a slowly-acquired cognitive decline that has actually come on suddenly.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by intense anxiety and extreme fear—fear of people, of darkness, of imaginary specters that fill the room and animate inanimate objects. There is a pervasive anguish, especially felt in the pit of the stomach, that drives the patient to despair and a conviction of imminent death. The emotional state is one of terrified helplessness alternating with violent, frenzied agitation.

rubric_passages.Bladder: If an inflammation of the bladder comes on, there is intense pain and tenderness, and from the shock of the suffering the mind is in a state of frenzy. The same state arises in the bladder as in the rectum, and there is retention with horrible torture. The patient sits on the commode and strains to pass the urine, but there is a paralytic condition of the bladder.
rubric_passages.Chest: Cholera stools; rice water discharges, with anxiety, restlessness, spasms of the muscles, cramps of the chest, prostration, increasing coldness and blueness; wants to be uncovered and he is going into collapse.
rubric_passages.Chill: The general constitutional state of a Camphor patient is coldness and extreme sensitiveness to cold. In acute inflammatory conditions he is cold and wants the covers off.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Jerking of the muscles, trembling and jerking. Spasmodic conditions with trembling.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: the limbs and abdomen are very cold and she suffers from cold when uncovered and sweats copiously when covered. She cannot endure covering to warm her limbs though she suffers from cold.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The general constitutional state of a Camphor patient is coldness and extreme sensitiveness to cold. In acute inflammatory conditions he is cold and wants the covers off. In acute complaints there is violent thirst, in chronic complaints thirstlessness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: It is useful in the climacteric period with flushes of heat and sweat in a warm room; the limbs and abdomen are very cold and she suffers from cold when uncovered and sweats copiously when covered. She cannot endure covering to warm her limbs though she suffers from cold.
rubric_passages.Head: The head is full of pain; throbbing pain. Contractive feeling as if laced together in the cerebellum. The whole back of the head and neck throb like hammers, worse from bending head forward; burning and stinging. Frontal headaches.
