rubric_passages.Mind: In the mental state, there is anxiety and extreme fear; fear of persons, of strange spheres, of the dark; the dark is filled with imaginary specters; he dare not get out of bed in the dark; everything that moves is a specter and the inanimate things of the room become alive and terrify him.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: It is suitable in some acute complaints attended with nervous excitement, even to frenzy, with spasms and convulsions and finally exhaustion.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Convulsions with frothing at the mouth. Blue lips, lockjaw, tetanus. The tongue is cold and trembling.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Cold and dry: Camphor. Cold and copious discharge Veratrum.
rubric_passages.Rectum: These bowels symptoms gradually increase until there is no ability to strain at stool, a paralytic condition. Rectum seems contracted and painful.
rubric_passages.Respiration: profuse discharge from the nose and from the air passages, from the nose to the bronchi. Bronchitis of children and old people. Old withered up people take cold at every exposure to weather and become cold and chilly.
rubric_passages.Skin: the body is blue and cold and yet must be uncovered. The face is cold, blue and shriveled, without much sweat. Erysipelatous appearance of face.
rubric_passages.Sleep: potentized Camphor will do more for him than the Camphor bottle, it will put him into a refreshing sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The pain in the stomach in gastritis is so violent that the anguish on the face is equal to that in Arsenic; a deathly anguish is felt in his stomach and he feels that he must die. Burning, rending, tearing pain in the stomach, with retching and vomiting. Anguish at the pit of the stomach drives him to despair. Heat in the stomach, Cold feeling in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: flashes of heat intermingle with rending, tearing, burning pains, either in the inflamed organ or along the nerves.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: he has worked until he is exhausted and now he is prostrated, cold and blue; here is the sphere where the old woman with her Camphor bottle has established a reputation.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: Tosses anxiously in bed. Cholera stools; rice water discharges, with anxiety, restlessness, spasms of the muscles.
rubric_passages.Clinical: The old Camphor, Cuprum and Veratrum still hold together for Asiatic cholera. In Camphor there is prostration, blueness, coldness and yet he wants to be uncovered and the body is cold and dry.
rubric_passages.Mind, night: fear of the dark; the dark is filled with imaginary specters; he dare not get out of bed in the dark; everything that moves is a specter and the inanimate things of the room become alive and terrify him.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: suddenly he becomes cold, blue and collapsed, as it were paralyzed and goes into a stupor. increasing coldness and blueness; wants to be uncovered and he is going into collapse.
rubric_passages.Face: The face is cold, blue and shriveled, without much sweat. Cold sweat on the face with vomiting. Erysipelatous appearance of face.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleeplessness: He closes the eyes, seemingly asleep, and answers no questions. Delirious with the heat, rage and mania, wants to jump out of bed or out of the window. Tosses anxiously in bed.
rubric_passages.Stool: After taking cold there is cutting, with involuntary discharge of dark brown faeces like coffee grounds. Cholera stools; rice water discharges.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat: Camph. has very little heat; it has the sensation of heat; but not a marked hot stage. during the heat and when the pains are on he wants to be covered up. The coldness is relieved by cold, he wants more cold.

profile.personality: A dreamy, otherworldly individual prone to ecstatic states, wild imagination, and loquacity. They oscillate between exaltation and profound weakness, often appearing detached from ordinary reality with a tendency toward theorizing and fantastical thinking.
profile.mental_state: The mind is flooded with unfinished ideas, crowding thoughts, and vivid hallucinations, making rational concentration nearly impossible. There is marked confusion of time and space, a sense of dual existence, and rapid oscillation between lucidity and irrationality. Forgetfulness of words and inability to complete sentences are characteristic.
profile.emotional_pattern: Emotions swing between spasmodic mirthfulness and deep anguish, with inappropriate laughter at serious matters alternating with moaning and weeping. Underlying fears of death, insanity, and darkness pervade the emotional landscape, though these are temporarily relieved by walking in open air.

rubric_passages.Back: Pain in the back at the menstrual period. Pain across the dorsal region preventing walking erect.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back at the menstrual period. Pain across the dorsal region preventing walking erect.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region: Pain across the dorsal region preventing walking erect.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Constant or frequent urination. Urine burns on passing. Burning, stinging in urethra, before, during and after urination.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Paralytic weakness of the limbs with trembling and thrilling. Numbness of limbs and soles. Pricking of soles. Rest ameliorates, and motion aggravates. Violent pains through the lower limbs on walking.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Paralytic weakness of the limbs with trembling and thrilling.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Great weakness spreads over the body. The symptoms resemble catalepsy. Anaesthesia and loss of muscular sense. Complaints ameliorated by rest.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Inflammation in the kidneys, with burning pain. Urine burns on passing. Burning, stinging in urethra, before, during and after urination.
rubric_passages.Head: Feels as if the calvarium were opening and shutting or being lifted and lowered into place. Pulsating pain through the head. Weight in occiput with pulsation. Shocks in the brain on regaining consciousness, and on waking from sleep. Stitching pains in temples. Tension of scalp. Tenderness of scalp.
rubric_passages.Mind: A strange ecstatic sensation pervades the body and senses. Wonderful imaginations and hallucinations. Wonderful exaggerations of time and space. He seems to have two existences, or to be conscious of two states, or to exist in two spheres. Delusions. Incoherent speech. Laughs at serious remarks. Fear of death; of insanity; of the dark. Anguish and sadness. He cannot control the mind to reason rationally upon any subject.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Grinding teeth during sleep. Stammering. Metallic taste. Desire for, and dread of water.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Sleepy, but cannot sleep. Starting of limbs during sleep. Dreams of dead bodies. Dreams prophetic. Nightmare.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Flatulence, distending abdomen, ameliorated by eructations.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Constant or frequent urination. Must wait for urine to start. Urine dribbles after urination. Much mucus in the urine.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Violent pains through the lower limbs on walking. Stitching pains in the kidneys. Stitching pains in temples.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: Inflammation in the kidneys, with burning pain. Urine burns on passing. Burning, stinging in urethra, before, during and after urination.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: Paralytic weakness of the limbs with trembling and thrilling.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Great weakness spreads over the body. He loses his sense and falls.
rubric_passages.Clinical: This remedy has cured many cases of gonorrhea. It is useful in the first stage, and cures the symptoms set for Cannabis sativa. It is useful in chordee during gonorrhoea.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Palpitation during sleep. Pressing pain, in the heart with suffocation during the Whole night. Stitching pains in the heart. Pulse, slow or rapid and irregular; fluttering; a nervous pulse.
rubric_passages.Ear: Hearing acute. Singing and buzzing in ears; pulsating.
rubric_passages.Face: Face pale and sunken. Insane look. Stupid look. Sickly, expressionless look.

profile.personality: A dreamy, confused individual who struggles with a sense of unreality and dissociation from their own identity. They experience a split between despondency and liveliness depending on time of day, suggesting an unstable, shifting temperament. There is a marked tendency toward hysteria and anxiety centered in the body.
profile.mental_state: Profound confusion of mind with inability to distinguish self from others—when speaking, it feels as though someone else is talking. Makes frequent errors in writing, speaking, reading, and comprehension, as if perceiving the world through a distorting filter. Sounds seem distant and unreal, and there is a persistent sensation that things are strange, as though living in a dream.
profile.emotional_pattern: Marked alternation between forenoon despondency and afternoon liveliness, indicating emotional instability tied to diurnal rhythms. A specific fear of going to bed suggests nighttime anxiety and dread of losing conscious control. Underlying hysteria manifests as a lump-in-throat sensation, with diffuse anxiety settling in the stomach rather than being mentally processed.

rubric_passages.Bladder: Spasmodic closure of the neck of the bladder at the close of urination.
rubric_passages.Chest: Catarrh of the chest. Bronchitis with wheezing. Asthma must have window open.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Stitching in the skin all over while perspiring. Numbness of finger tips.
rubric_passages.Head: Rush of blood to the head, as though it came from the stomach. Opening and shutting of the vortex begins on waking, lasts all day, and is worse from noise. Sensation of drops of cold water on scalp. Formication.
rubric_passages.Mind: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream. Confusion is to his personal identity. Makes mistakes in writing and speaking, and misunderstands what he reads and hears said.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Anxiety in the stomach. Aversion to meat.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Most difficult and painful urination. Violent urging to urinate. Constant or frequent urging to urinate. Involuntary urination. Violent pain at the close of urination.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: Rush of blood to the head, as though it came from the stomach.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness: Despondent in forenoon, lively in the afternoon.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Oedema of the prepuce with gonorrhoea. Thick yellow gonorrhoeal discharge. Much dropsical swelling of the prepuce. Intense sexual excitement in both sexes. Chordee.
rubric_passages.Mind, delirium: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream.
rubric_passages.Mind, unconsciousness: Seems as though her senses would vanish.
rubric_passages.Vision: Inflammation of the conjunctiva and varicose veins. Sensation of sand in the eyes.
rubric_passages.Mind, delusions: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream. Confusion is to his personal identity.
